## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? Link any related issue, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New / updated knowledge-base signature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] CI / build

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Lint is clean (`uv run ruff check .`)
- [ ] Formatting is applied (`uv run ruff format .`)
- [ ] Type checks pass (`uv run mypy src`)
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant (README / `docs/`)
- [ ] **Read-only guarantee preserved** — this change does not execute commands, mutate any system, or transmit analyzed content unless the user explicitly enables an external AI provider
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, trade-offs, or follow-ups. -->
